powerups.name: Calm Shield
powerups.description: Hold steady; let the mind settle. A protective barrier forms around you.

powerups.name: Precision Beam
powerups.description: Focus your thoughts into a single devastating beam.

powerups.name: Time Dilation
powerups.description: Your perception accelerates. The world moves in slow motion around you.

powerups.name: Phase Shift
powerups.description: Become ethereal. Phase through enemies unharmed.
